commit.message:
fix: replace max-w-xl/2xl/3xl with arbitrary values for Tailwind v4 compat

The @theme block defines --spacing-xl: 32px which overrides Tailwind v4's
max-w-xl (normally 36rem) to 32px, collapsing all layouts. Same issue
with max-w-2xl and max-w-3xl. Fixed by using explicit rem values:
max-w-xl -> max-w-[36rem], max-w-2xl -> max-w-[42rem], max-w-3xl -> max-w-[48rem]

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: Phase 37 kiosk — GNOME autostart + verified chromium snap install

Root causes found from live machine diagnostics:
1. /snap/bin/chromium missing — snap install was silently swallowed by
   '2>/dev/null || warn'; now uses hard fail (exit 1) if install fails
2. WaylandEnable=false was commented (#WaylandEnable=false) because
   previous sed-based approach failed; now uses 'sudo bash -c cat >'
   to guarantee entire file is overwritten with correct content
3. Custom X session (archimedes-kiosk.desktop + AccountsService) fails
   because Chromium snap requires GNOME session env vars (DBUS, XDG, etc.)
   that a minimal custom X session does not provide

Fix:
- Abandon custom X session approach entirely
- Remove /usr/share/xsessions/archimedes-kiosk.desktop on bootstrap run
- Remove /var/lib/AccountsService/users/$USER override (use GNOME default)
- Use GNOME autostart (~/.config/autostart/archimedes-kiosk.desktop)
  which runs after GNOME session is fully initialized with all env vars
- Chromium snap install now has explicit success check + hard fail
- Added grep verify for WaylandEnable=false after writing gdm3 config

Co-authored-by: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: goal form inputs reset on every keystroke

useEffect had initialHabitIds in its dependency array. The default
parameter `= []` creates a new array reference on each render, so
every keystroke caused the effect to re-run and wipe all form fields.

Fix: depend only on `open` so the form initialises once when the
modal opens, not on every subsequent render.

Comprehensive QA fixes: security, translations, performance, a11y, achievements

SECURITY:
- Firestore rules: ownership-based access for childProfiles/parentChildren,
  new rules for push-subscriptions and support-tickets
- API auth: Firebase token verification on ai/tts/support-ticket endpoints
- Rate limiting: in-memory rate limiter (20/min AI, 30/min TTS)
- Client-side: all fetch calls now send Authorization Bearer token

TRANSLATIONS:
- Add ar/ru to 585 words across words-a1/a2/b2/c1/business.json
- Add ar/ru to 100 phrases in phrases-common.json
- Fix LEVEL_META ar/ru name mismatches in curriculum-index.js

PERFORMANCE:
- VocabularyPage: lazy load word data (571KB → 45KB chunk)
- ChildProgressPage: parallel Firestore reads (Promise.all vs sequential)
- UserProgressContext: parallel child profile loading
- Memory leaks: track setTimeout in AudioLearningPage, LessonPage

ACCESSIBILITY & UX:
- aria-labels on 50+ icon-only buttons across 13 files
- RTL margin fixes (ltr:/rtl: variants) in Header, Family, Reading, Home
- BottomNav badge position RTL fix
- border-l-4 RTL flip on HomePage cards
- PageErrorBoundary wrapping 6 heavy lazy-loaded pages
- Modal: Escape key to close

ACHIEVEMENTS:
- New achievementChecker.js utility with centralized checking logic
- Achievement toast notification system in UserProgressContext
- Progress counter tracking across all lesson/game/vocab/pronunciation pages
- All 39 non-adventure achievements now triggerable

SW bumped to v90.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Auto-detect corner positions from waypoint curvature for any track

Replace all hardcoded corner lat/lon positions with a curvature-based
algorithm (detectCornersFromWaypoints). For every track — known or unknown:

1. Compute the turning angle at each interior waypoint.
2. Smooth with an adaptive rolling mean (~5% of waypoint count).
3. Find local maxima above threshold = corner apexes, exactly on the
   track centerline.
4. Merge peaks within ~110 m (same physical corner).
5. Label with official names in lap order (cornerNames) for known tracks,
   or T1, T2, T3… sequentially for unknown/OSM-fetched tracks.

Known tracks now carry cornerNames instead of manual corner coordinates:
- Road Atlanta: T1–T7, T10, T11, T12 (T8/T9 = back straight, no corners)
- Road America: T1, T3, T5, T6, T7, T8, T10, T12, T13, T14
- Brainerd, Sebring, PittRace: sequential names added

For any unrecognised track the app auto-fetches the OSM raceway outline and
runs the same algorithm, labeling T1, T2, T3… from the S/F forward.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: remove Content-Type from GET requests to prevent CORS preflight

apiFetch was unconditionally sending Content-Type: application/json on
every request including GETs. Content-Type is not a CORS simple header,
so browsers fired an OPTIONS preflight before GET /healthz — the very
request used to wake the Render cold-start instance. When Render is
spinning up it cannot answer the preflight, causing ERR_FAILED and the
'flight request does not pass access control check' error.

Fix: only attach Content-Type for methods that carry a body (POST/PUT/PATCH).
Also give getHealth() its own bare fetch with no extra headers so it is
guaranteed to stay a simple CORS request regardless of future apiFetch changes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat(preprod): Add distribution error endpoint for launchpad (#109497)

Add a dedicated endpoint (`PUT
.../files/preprodartifacts/{id}/distribution/`) for launchpad to report
distribution processing errors back to the monolith. This mirrors the
existing `ProjectPreprodSizeEndpoint` pattern.

When launchpad encounters a distribution failure (unsupported artifact
type, invalid code signature, simulator build), it needs a way to set
`installable_app_error_code` and `installable_app_error_message` on the
artifact so the frontend can display the reason. Previously, the only
option was the general `update` endpoint which marks the entire artifact
as failed — but distribution errors shouldn't affect the artifact's
overall state.

Follow-up to #109062. The launchpad side that calls this endpoint is in
getsentry/launchpad#567.

Refs EME-842, EME-422

---------

Co-authored-by: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
refactor(elnora-cli): comprehensive review improvements (#6)

* refactor(elnora-cli): fix bugs, improve security, add tests (iteration 1)

- Fix _load_env to walk from CWD instead of __file__ (broken for pip installs)
- Fix TOML parser to exact-match 'api_key' and skip comments
- Fix output_success mutating caller's dict in-place via --fields
- Remove double GUID validation (commands + client) — client owns validation
- Remove dead _validate_id wrapper method
- Add distinct exit codes per error type (2=validation, 3=auth, 4=not_found, 5=rate_limit, 6=server)
- Add page number validation (reject page < 1)
- Add deprecation warning for --api-key CLI flag (process list exposure)
- Add config file permission warning on read (insecure mode check)
- Remove internal reference comment ("Matches Vanta/Linear CLI")
- Fix LICENSE copyright placeholder
- Fix pyproject.toml: add authors, readme, urls, keywords, classifiers, click<9 upper bound
- Add CHANGELOG comparison links
- Fix hardcoded version in test — import __version__ instead
- Add 50 new tests: validation, scrub, SSRF, HTTP errors, auth resolution, config parsing, output formatting, completions

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* refactor(elnora-cli): crash handler, PowerShell completions, test coverage (iteration 2)

- Crash handler uses typed exit codes from _EXIT_CODES mapping
- Rewrite completion.py: dynamic command discovery, PowerShell support
- Lazy csv/io imports in output_success
- .env file permission check matching config.toml pattern
- Remove SOC2 comment from codeql.yml (public repo)
- Fix skills doc: "Destructive operation" instead of "Permanent deletion"
- Add README exit codes documentation
- Tests: output_error exit codes, handle_errors, PowerShell completion
- Rewrite test_client.py with proper monkeypatch and _load_env tests

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* refactor(elnora-cli): fix env var bug, remove dead code, add tests (iteration 3)

- Fix _load_env: empty env vars now overridden by .env values
- Remove dead `raise AssertionError("unreachable")` after NoReturn call
- Use importlib.metadata for version in config.py (no duplicate)
- Allow AuthError to accept custom suggestion parameter
- Add status guidance in tasks update help text
- Tests: crash handler, redirect handler, save_config, inline comments

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* refactor(elnora-cli): fix TOCTOU in save_config, single version source (iteration 4)

- Fix save_config TOCTOU: use os.open with 0o600 mode on Unix to avoid
  credential exposure window between write and chmod
- Use importlib.metadata.version in __init__.py (single source of truth)
- Add output_warning test coverage (3 tests)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* refactor(elnora-cli): config dir perms, files content output, integration tests (iteration 5)

- Set ~/.elnora/ directory to 0o700 on Unix (prevent content enumeration)
- files content now respects --compact/--output/--fields flags
- Add command-level integration tests with mocked client (12 tests)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* refactor(elnora-cli): fix files content CSV, add task tests, clean conftest (iteration 6)

- files content: only use structured output for --compact/--fields,
  raw text for default and CSV (avoids corrupted CSV for multi-line content)
- Add integration tests for tasks send/messages/update/archive
- Remove unused conftest fixtures (dead code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix(elnora-cli): ruff formatting and CodeQL URL sanitization finding

- Run ruff format on 5 files that failed CI format check
- Fix CodeQL "Incomplete URL substring sanitization" in redirect test:
  use explicit hostname assertion instead of bare substring check

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix(elnora-cli): resolve CodeQL incomplete URL sanitization finding

Remove hostname substring assertion from redirect test — CodeQL flags
any `hostname in string` pattern. Instead, only verify that sensitive
URL parts (query params, path) are NOT leaked in the error message.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: add auto-retry for DB queries on connection termination

Supabase pgbouncer drops idle connections, causing
"Connection terminated unexpectedly" errors. Added a query
wrapper that automatically retries once on connection errors.
Also reduced pool max to 5 and idle timeout to 20s.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Claude/audit and fix bugs qr pk g (#97)

* fix: 5 confirmed bugs from audit across engine/ai/app/photos/data

engine.js: fix cross-day dedup logic in genWeekRotation — the altOutfit
finder used OR which accepted outfits with missing top/bot as valid
alternatives. Now requires af.top && af.bot before checking ID diff.

ai.js (matchStrapToWatches): remove !w.active guard that silently
filtered every watch without an explicit active field. Status-based
filters (sold/incoming/pending-trade) are sufficient.

app.js: add .catch() on the unhandled aiVision promise in the week
rotation AI critique button, preventing a stuck loading spinner on
network/API errors.

photos.js (d2b): add null check on match() result before accessing [1]
to prevent TypeError crash on malformed data URL inputs.

data.js (migrateStraps): append Math.random() suffix to timestamp-based
strap IDs to prevent collisions when multiple watches are migrated within
the same millisecond.

All 244 tests pass.

https://claude.ai/code/session_012xsP67tUkmFLFMY7PjWK6s

* chore: update package-lock.json

https://claude.ai/code/session_012xsP67tUkmFLFMY7PjWK6s

* fix: double-mm in size display and AbortError message

app.js: AI watch scan was storing case_size as e.g. '41mm' (appending
'mm' to what could already be '41mm' from the AI JSON), while every
display site also appends 'mm' — resulting in '41mmmm'. Fix: strip
trailing 'mm' via replace(/\s*mm$/i,'') before storing.

app.js: form Case Size input also accepted user-typed '40mm' strings
with the same double-suffix outcome. Fix: normalize on onChange to
strip any trailing 'mm' before calling set('size', ...).

supabase.js: push/pull catch blocks built a friendly AbortError message
('Pull timed out (10s)') but then re-threw the original raw Error
whose .message is 'The user aborted a request.' Fix: throw new Error(msg)
so callers display the formatted message instead.

All 244 tests pass.

https://claude.ai/code/session_012xsP67tUkmFLFMY7PjWK6s

* fix: 7 bugs across utils/app/enhancements/cli — full audit pass

utils.js (inferSize): was returning m[1]+"mm" (e.g. "42mm") which, when
combined with every display site appending another "mm", produced "42mmmm"
in the UI. Fixed to return just the digit string ("42"); display sites
already handle the "mm" suffix. Updated tests to match correct output.

app.js (auth button): the Sign In / Sign Up button had two className
keys in the same props object — {className:"btn btn-gold", ..., className:"sx0"}.
In JS the second key wins, so the button always rendered with class "sx0"
only, losing all btn-gold/btn-ghost styling. Merged into a single key.

app.js (aiOccasionPlan keyboard handler): .then() had no .catch(), so
any API or network error left setAiOccasionLoading(true) stuck, freezing
the UI. Added .catch(function(){setAiOccasionLoading(false)}).

app.js (aiOccasionPlan async onClick): the async button handler had no
try-catch, so a rejection left the loading spinner stuck forever. Wrapped
body in try{}finally{setAiOccasionLoading(false)}.

enhancements.js (CompareRow size): w.size could be stored as "41mm"
(from old inferSize or imported data), and the display was appending
another "mm". Fixed to normalize via String(w.size).replace(/mm$/i,"")
before appending the suffix.

enhancements.js (ReactDOM.render): upgraded the enhancements portal
mount from the deprecated React 18 ReactDOM.render() to createRoot().render()
to eliminate console warnings and prevent double-render issues.

cli.js: same double-mm bug as above in the size display line.

All 244 tests pass.

https://claude.ai/code/session_012xsP67tUkmFLFMY7PjWK6s

* test: expand test suite to 288 tests; fix missing autoMatchColors import

- Add supabase-sync.test.js (17 tests): config persistence, version tracking, constant validation
- Expand ai.test.js with matchStrapToWatches tests (validates the !w.active bug fix)
- Expand data.test.js with migrateStraps tests: size normalization and ID uniqueness
- Expand engine.test.js with genWeekRotation cross-day dedup validation
- Expand utils.test.js with parseWatchLog end-to-end tests (6 cases)
- Expand photos.test.js with additional hammingDist edge cases
- Fix real bug: utils.js used autoMatchColors (from data.js) without importing it,
  causing parseWatchLog to throw ReferenceError at runtime — now properly imported

https://claude.ai/code/session_012xsP67tUkmFLFMY7PjWK6s

---------

Fix Blazor Server circuit: force Long Polling transport for Coolify proxy

O proxy reverso do Coolify bloqueia WebSocket, impedindo o circuit
interativo do Blazor. Configura blazor.web.js para usar Long Polling
como transporte (funciona através de qualquer proxy HTTP).
Também adiciona EnableDetailedErrors no SignalR para diagnóstico.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Try z-index:0 on #page-bg to fix iOS Safari safe area texture

All previous approaches used z-index:-1, which may be painted over by
iOS Safari's canvas background extension in safe areas. Using z-index:0
keeps #page-bg in normal stacking flow above the canvas; #root gets
z-index:1 to stay on top. Also simplified inset to 0 (viewport-fit=cover
already reaches device edges, negative env() insets were overcorrecting).

- Add theme toggle button to header (desktop + mobile)
- Replace all hardcoded colors with CSS variables across all pages
- Support light mode for hero, navbar, studio, portfolio, pricing, blog, contact sections

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

repository.name: KATOV
repository.description: Katov.uz - Creative Website Services

commit.message:
Add conversation screen, follow-up automation, and Evolution webhook

- Messages table + migrations for storing outbound/inbound WhatsApp messages
- Follow-up fields on campaigns (enabled, messages JSONB) and dispatches (index, next_followup_at)
- Pipeline: replace modal with side drawer showing chat thread with real-time updates
- Dispatches: add last reply column preview
- Campaigns: add Follow-up tab with toggle, up to 2 reminders with delay + template
- send-whatsapp: save outbound messages, schedule follow-ups
- whatsapp-webhook: save inbound messages, cancel follow-ups on reply
- evolution-webhook: new edge function for Evolution API inbound messages + connection status
- process-followups: new cron edge function to send pending follow-ups
- docker-compose: add Evolution webhook env vars

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
